mapper.select:
SELECT id AS nodeId, node_name AS nodeName, endpoint, status, block_height AS blockHeight, last_sync_time AS lastSyncTime, created_time AS createdTime, updated_time AS updatedTime FROM blockchain_node
AND ( node_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR endpoint LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
AND status = #{status}
ORDER BY updated_time DESC, id DESC

SELECT id AS nodeId, node_name AS nodeName, endpoint, status, block_height AS blockHeight, last_sync_time AS lastSyncTime, created_time AS createdTime, updated_time AS updatedTime FROM blockchain_node WHERE id = #{nodeId} LIMIT 1
